channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Evaluating the Role of Wegovy in Addressing New Zealand’s Obesity Challenge
item.description: Wegovy, a medication based on semaglutide, has attracted significant attention in New Zealand due to its potential for substantial weight loss. The drug works by regulating appetite and blood sugar, h...

item.title: Ken Paxton draws criticism after defending his record by comparing it to Trump in Fox News interview
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton faced widespread criticism and online mockery following a Sunday interview on Fox News' “Sunday Morning Futures” with host Maria Bartiromo. During the segment, Paxton...

item.title: South Australia warned of severe weather with heavy rain and strong winds
item.description: South Australia is on high alert as a severe storm system, which recently caused significant disruption in Western Australia, approaches the state. The Bureau of Meteorology has issued warnings for th...

item.title: Bayelsa State Launches First Commercial Flight Operations Through Pioneer Airlines Partnership
item.description: Bayelsa State don officially enter commercial aviation sector as Pioneer Airlines carry out its first non-scheduled maiden flight using an ATR 72-600 aircraft newly acquired by the state government. A...

item.title: Zainab Ansell marks 40 years of Zara Adventures and highlights growth of adventure tourism
item.description: Zainab Ansell, the founder of Zara Adventures, has celebrated 40 years in the travel and tourism industry, marking a long journey of building one of the most recognised adventure travel companies. She...

item.title: Bangkok streets transformed with rainbow displays during Pride parade celebrations
item.description: Bangkok, Thailand’s capital, was filled with vibrant rainbow colours as the city hosted a Pride parade, according to a Reuters report published on June 1, 2026. Streets across key areas of Bangkok wer...

item.title: King Misuzulu Confirms Former Private Secretary Still Active in Royal Duties
item.description: AmaZulu King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has addressed recent confusion over the status of his former Private Secretary, Arnold Nododile. Despite last week’s announcement by Traditional Prime Minister Rever...

item.title: Sindh Faces Severe Water Shortage; Minister Urges Federal Action
item.description: Senior Minister Sharjeel Inam Memon has expressed strong concerns over the Indus River Systems Authority’s (Irsa) continued reduction of Sindh’s water share, calling it unjust and in violation of the ...

item.title: Living with Parkinson’s: How Deep Brain Stimulation Improved My Daily Life
item.description: Elizabeth Rigley shares her personal experience with Parkinson’s disease and the impact of deep brain stimulation (DBS) on her life. Diagnosed at 67, she faced the progressive challenges of motor symp...

item.title: Bill Cosby Denied New Trial After $19 Million Civil Sexual Assault Ruling
item.description: A Los Angeles County Superior Court judge has rejected Bill Cosby’s motion for a new trial in a civil sexual assault case, upholding a jury’s $19.25 million damages award to former waitress Donna Mots...

item.title: Profile and legacy of Nollywood actor Patrick Okoye, known as Mr Energy
item.description: Nollywood has been thrown into mourning following the death of popular actor Patrick Chukwura Okoye, widely known as Mr Energy, who passed away on Thursday, 28 May 2026. His death was first announced ...

item.title: Teenager Rafael Jodar reaches Roland-Garros quarter-finals on main draw debut
item.description: Rafael Jodar, a 19-year-old Spanish tennis player, has made an impressive run at the 2026 Roland-Garros, reaching the quarter-finals on his main draw debut. Following in the footsteps of Rafael Nadal,...

item.title: Stranger Returns Mountain Bike After Heart Attack on Trail
item.description: While descending a mountain bike trail, a specialist anaesthetist experienced chest pain and realised they were having a heart attack. Despite the severity of the situation and the remote location, th...

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon speaks out following Peter Murrell's embezzlement confession
item.description: Nicola Sturgeon gave her first broadcast interview since her former husband, Peter Murrell, admitted to embezzling over £400,000 from donations made to the Scottish National Party (SNP). In the interv...

item.title: Government to release second set of documents on Mandelson’s US ambassador appointment
item.description: The UK government is expected to publish a second and potentially extensive batch of documents concerning the appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson as the UK’s ambassador to the United States. According...

item.title: Gor Mahia bag prize money for league win; comparison with East African champions
item.description: Gor Mahia clinched the 2025/2026 Kenya Premier League title, finishing the season with 69 points and securing a 22nd league crown. The club secured the championship ahead of AFC Leopards, with their r...

item.title: Temporary free public transport scheme in Victoria concludes, regular fares resume
item.description: Free public transport for commuters in Victoria has officially come to an end, with the measure concluding from today, 1 June 2026. The temporary initiative, which had allowed passengers to travel wit...

item.title: Webinar in Vijayawada focuses on hydrocarbon exploration and energy security for India

item.title: Paul Krugman warns about U.S. political instability and inequality in post-Trump era
item.description: A Nobel Prize-winning economist, Paul Krugman, has issued a warning about the long-term political and economic consequences of the movement associated with former President Donald Trump. In comments s...

item.title: DOJ, BOC, NBI strengthen coordination vs smuggling syndicates
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ), Bureau of Customs (BOC), and National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) are stepping up their coordination efforts to go after smuggling bosses and organized syndicates op...
